title: Midnight Skyblock Texture Pack
description: Good looking Skyblock Pack for every island
body:
**Midnight Pack** for Hypixel SkyBlock: dark-themed, clean UI, and foraging-focused textures. Frequent updates keep it current, readable, and smooth for long grinding sessions in SkyBlock daily.
Block BETA is out, we are curently working on the iteams for the full release! Join the dc for any questions

Have fun playing skyblock!
